strings.panel.p2.bubble.left.html: I've dreamed of this day for so long! Kiss me, baby!
strings.panel.p3.bubble.left.html: C'mon, I've died a thousand deaths for you!
strings.panel.p3.bubble.right.html: As if you had a choice, sigh. Alright, just wait five seconds.
strings.panel.p4.bubble.left.html: Five seconds? What's in five seconds?
